page_metadata.biotools__summary: A program for the simulation of gene family evolution under incomplete lineage sorting (ILS), gene duplication and loss (GDL), replacing horizontal gene transfer (HGT) and gene conversion (GC).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A program for the simulation of gene family evolution under incomplete lineage sorting (ILS), gene duplication and loss (GDL), replacing horizontal gene transfer (HGT) and gene conversion (GC).
